originalTitle: Cocktail 2 Official Trailer | Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna | In Cinemas 19th June
content: From friends to lovers to CHAOS, the perfect 🍸 is back. #Cocktail2 In Cinemas 19th June. Trailer Out Now. Directed By: Homi Adajania Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan, Ankur Garg Music Director: Pritam Written by: Tarun Jain, Luv Ranjan Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna Story By: Luv Ranjan Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya Production Design: Arvind Ashok Kumar, Bindiya Chhabria Editor: Akshara Prabhakar Associate Producers: Sanjeev Mishra, Vineeta Tanwar Executive Director: Abhishek Kapur Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly Executive Producers: Shraddha S. Thorat, Roshan Singh COO & Legal Head: Ashni Parekh Head of Commercials & Distribution: Poonam Shivdasani Finance Head: Anuradha Walawalkar Sound Designer: Anirban Sengupta Re-Recording Mixer: Rajakrishnan M. R Associate Director (SICILY): Vikram Dawar Chief Assistant Director: Priyansh Gabra O.A.P: Lagnesh Joshi Script Supervisor: Chitgunn Singh Director's Assistant: Daani Naidu Associate Line Producer: Hemant Dubey Casting By: Panchami Ghavri Secondary Costume Designer: Akshay Tyagi Associate Costume Designer: Sukriti Grover Post Production: The Post Co. DI: Redefine DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC) VFX Producer (Maddock): Kunal Jagdish Sodha VFX: Squad VFX Pvt Ltd, Astra Studios Music On: Universal Music Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-One) Head Brand PR & Social: Sonia Huria PR: Ritu Devnani (Butterfly Communications) Local Line Producers: Turtle Films (Delhi), Singh Productions (Chandigarh), The Family SRL (Italy) Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX Licensed Song: Tum Hi Ho Bandhu Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty Lyricist: Irshad Kamil Singers: Neeraj Shridhar and Kavita Seth Label: Sony Music Entertainment India Follow us on: Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maddockfilms/ Twitter: https://x.com/MaddockFilms Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms Threads: https://www.threads.net/@maddockfilms
chineseSummary: 马多克电影 · 10,781,865 次观看
chineseContent: 从朋友到恋人再到混乱，完美的🍸回来了。 #Cocktail2 6 月 19 日在电影院上映。预告片现已推出。导演：Homi Adajania 制片人：Dinesh Vijan、Luv Ranjan、Pramita R Vijan、Ankur Garg 音乐总监：Pritam 编剧：Tarun Jain、Luv Ranjan 演员：Shahid Kapoor、Kriti Sanon、Rashmika Mandanna 故事编写：Luv Ranjan 联合制片人：Sharada Karki Jalota、Pooja Prem Patheja 摄影指导：Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran 歌词：Amitabh Bhattacharya 制作设计：Arvind Ashok Kumar、Bindiya Chhabria 编辑：Akshara Prabhakar 副制作人：Sanjeev Mishra、Vineeta Tanwar 执行导演：Abhishek Kapur 服装设计师：Anaita Shroff Adajania 编舞总监：Vijay A. Ganguly 执行制作人：Shraddha S. Thorat、Roshan Singh 首席运营官和法律顾问负责人：Ashni Parekh 广告与发行负责人：Poonam Shivdasani 财务负责人：Anuradha Walawalkar 音响设计师：Anirban Sengupta 重新录音混音器：Rajakrishnan M. R 副导演（西西里岛）：Vikram Dawar 首席助理导演：Priyansh Gabra O.A.P：Lagnesh Joshi 剧本主管：Chitgunn Singh 导演助理：Daani Naidu 副线制片人：Hemant Dubey 选角：Panchami Ghavri 二级服装设计师：Akshay Tyagi 副服装设计师：Sukriti Grover 后期制作：The Post Co. DI: Redefine DI 调色师：Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC) 视觉特效制作人 (Maddock)：Kunal Jagdish Sodha 视觉特效：Squad VFX Pvt Ltd、Astra Studios 音乐播放：Universal Music 宣传设计：Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-One) 首席品牌公关与社交：Sonia Huria 公关：Ritu Devnani (Butterfly Communications) 本地制作人：Turtle Films（德里）、Singh Productions（昌迪加尔）、The Family SRL（意大利） 视觉推广：Just Right Studioz NX 授权歌曲：Tum Hi Ho Bandhu 音乐作曲家：Pritam
